## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if helpful.

## Environment

- GreenCap version: <!-- shown at the bottom of the sidebar, e.g. v0.7.7 -->
- Cluster provider: <!-- e.g. Minikube (Docker), managed, on-prem -->
- Install method: <!-- setup.sh / Docker Compose / bootRun -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 14 -->
- Browser: <!-- if the issue is UI-related -->

## Logs / additional context

Any relevant logs, stack traces, or extra context.
